title: President Rinkēvičs heads to Lithuania
summary_full: Just a couple of weeks after heading north to visit Estonia, on July 15th President Edgars Rinkēvičs is heading south to visit Latvia's southern neighbour and fellow Baltic state, Lithuania.
summary_public: Just a couple of weeks after heading north to visit Estonia, on July 15th President Edgars Rinkēvičs is heading south to visit Latvia's southern neighbour and fellow Baltic state, Lithuania.
